name: headlamp-openfeature
description: Headlamp plugin for viewing and managing OpenFeature feature flags

no-restricted-globals.name: fetch
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct fetch is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK (@kinvolk/headlamp-plugin/lib).

no-restricted-globals.name: XMLHttpRequest
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct XMLHttpRequest is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK (@kinvolk/headlamp-plugin/lib).

no-restricted-globals.name: localStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct localStorage is forbidden (FR34). Session state must go only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel client state bypassing the SDK watch.

no-restricted-globals.name: sessionStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct sessionStorage is forbidden (FR34). Session state must go only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel client state bypassing the SDK watch.

no-restricted-globals.name: WebSocket
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct WebSocket is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel data plane bypassing the SDK watch.

no-restricted-globals.name: EventSource
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct EventSource is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel data plane bypassing the SDK watch.

patterns.message: Import only from @kinvolk/headlamp-plugin/lib or /lib/CommonComponents — never SDK internals (/lib/plugin/**).
Use named imports from @mui/material; only @mui/material/styles (and its subpaths) may be deep-imported (for styled()).
Direct HTTP-client libraries are forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel data plane bypassing the SDK watch.

no-restricted-syntax.message: No namespace import of @mui/material; use named imports instead.
Direct XMLHttpRequest is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK.
window.fetch is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK.
window.localStorage is forbidden (FR34). Session state must go only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel client state bypassing the SDK watch.
window.sessionStorage is forbidden (FR34). Session state must go only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel client state bypassing the SDK watch.
window.WebSocket is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel data plane bypassing the SDK watch.
window.EventSource is forbidden (FR34). Access clusters only through the Headlamp SDK — no parallel data plane bypassing the SDK watch.
No hardcoded hex colours; use theme tokens instead.
No hardcoded px literals; use theme spacing tokens instead.
No hardcoded hex colours in template literals; use theme tokens instead.
No hardcoded px literals in template literals; use theme spacing tokens instead.
